ddls:
CREATE TABLE "congressional_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional member */,
  "congress" INTEGER /* Number of the Congress they served in */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber they served in (House or Senate) */,
  "bioguide_id" TEXT /* Bioguide identifier for the member */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "middlename" TEXT /* Middle name of the member */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Suffix of the member (e.g., Jr., Sr.) */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "state" TEXT /* State they represent */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Incumbent status (Yes or No) */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Date their term started */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* Date their term ended */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the member when their term started */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the member */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the member */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the member before entering Congress */,
  "committee_assignments" TEXT /* Committee assignments of the member */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact information */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone contact information */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the member's headshot or official photo */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congressional_members_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congressional_members_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("abbreviation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congressional_members_congress FOREIGN KEY ("congress") REFERENCES congresses ("congress_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "congresses" (
  "congress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Congress session */,
  "congress_number" INTEGER /* Number of the Congress */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the Congress session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the Congress session */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the Congress session */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the President during the Congress session */,
  "vice_president" TEXT /* Name of the Vice President during the Congress session */,
  "majority_leader" TEXT /* Name of the Majority Leader */,
  "minority_leader" TEXT /* Name of the Minority Leader */,
  "speaker_of_the_house" TEXT /* Name of the Speaker of the House */,
  "senate_majority_leader" TEXT /* Name of the Senate Majority Leader */,
  "senate_minority_leader" TEXT /* Name of the Senate Minority Leader */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP during the Congress session */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate during the Congress session */,
  "legislative_focus" TEXT /* Key legislative areas or themes during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("congress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Midwest, South, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "time_zones" TEXT /* Time zones in the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_senator" TEXT /* Name of the state senator */,
  "state_representative" TEXT /* Name of the state representative */,
  "state_legislature_type" TEXT /* Bicameral or unicameral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* General ideology of the political party (e.g., Liberal, Conservative, Moderate) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  "current_leader" TEXT /* Name of the current party leader */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the party's official website */,
  "platform_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the party's platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each congressional member
